hypothesis: If scientific PDFs from nanozyme and chelate complex articles are converted to structure-preserving markdown with marker-pdf and enriched with GPT-4o image captions, then a single-agent LLM extractor will achieve higher per-column precision/recall/F1 and better JSON format compliance than baseline LLMs, a general-purpose agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems because structured multimodal preprocessing reduces parsing errors and information ambiguity.
